name: Cocoa Chocolate Crinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add vanilla and beaten eggs, mixing well.
3. Sift together cocoa, flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Alternately add the sifted dry ingredients and milk to the creamed mixture, blending after each addition.
5. Stir in nuts.
6. Chill dough for at least 3 hours.
7. Shape chilled dough into small balls.
8. Roll each ball in powdered sugar.
9. Place cookie sheets about 2-inches apart.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
